title: DestinyBetween's Pack
description:
A multipurpose compiled modpack.
With visual buffs, extra biomes,fun and usefull mods to enjoy
body:
# Welcome to My first modpack
So you enjoy minecraft but have not that many friends ive made this modpack for you

## What is this modpack about:
this modpack is a compiled pack of great mods there are more worlds beter visuals open world for nether end and overworld (other can only be fixed by configuration)
and companions that can fight and help (currently only in overworld i will search for a mod allowing them to follow)

## Some mods it contain:

- Queen cats and dogs(for the companion and there will be a future version without this for server and full solo based)
- Immersive portals (to make it more openworld)
- Some shaders to make it look more improved
- and much more like (trees will fall down and drop all stuff at once, torches cant be placed if in offhand, double door open simultaneously and have Little animation,a first person body(can be turned off if annoying with f6) and aether biome)

so check it out because there is and will be a lot more funny and usefull stuff

### Important to know:

some mods are telling incompatible (just ignore it works future version will turn this message off) 

if there are any issues feel free to contact me here and i will see to fix it asap
